Tetras aie opie te fara ate (arava ares a fafear ares urafae te arecereat Ft we afean fafras, 2008, % fafaam 19 & foro faarfeters et searfta far arom, arg: — "19. fataa. en fatraat Ft soreat & wa Fafa, arg yea Tera star f AT Sear Foie ate are fear aT" ¥, teat tre, Fase srarfersra (az) [Pasir 111/4/s747./188/14] ure frou}: qey fare ara fa. 541(e7) Rate 17-07-2008 % mean & afer hae eo & ai ora. 274(7) ae 21-04-2009 var frat. tiesto pra(aiy4e feat 17-02-2014 ® areas & denise feo a -- 1 of 2 -- 12 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEc. 4] NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st January 2015 F. No. L-MISC/VI/1/2007.—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Access Code for Common Carrier or Contract Carrier Natural Gas Pipelines) Regulations, 2008, namely:— 1, Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Access Code for Common Carrier or Contract Carrier Natural Gas Pipelines) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2, For regulation 19 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Access Code for Common Carrier or Contract Carrier Natural Gas Pipelines) Regulations, 2008, the following shall be substituted, namely: -— “19, Miscellaneous. If any question arises as to the interpretation of these regulations, the same shall be decided by the Board.”. K. RAJESWARA RAO.
